# Copilot Instructions for PhotoAI

This repository uses `.github/AGENTS.md` and `.github/MEMORY.md` as continuity anchors.

## Session Start Protocol

1. Read `.github/AGENTS.md` and `.github/MEMORY.md`.
2. Check current changed files and latest trace (`logs/last_run.log`).
3. Confirm active goal and constraints before edits.

## Session End Protocol

1. Summarize completed changes and validation.
2. Update `.github/MEMORY.md` if behavior/policy changed.
3. Call out remaining risks and next best action.
